description: Second round of docs UI polish: fix tab border gaps, blockquote rhythm, horizontal rule styling, callout/card border-radius inconsistency, and how-it-works section spacing.

userStories.title: Fix tab trigger bottom border gaps
userStories.description: As a docs reader, I want the tab component to have a continuous bottom border line with no gaps under inactive triggers, and no extra space between the tab bar and content panel.
acceptanceCriteria: Inactive tab triggers have border-b-border (visible bottom border matching the list border) instead of fully transparent borders
Active tab triggers keep full border-border on all sides
Tab content panel uses mt-0 instead of mt-2 since borders are now adjacent
cd docs && bun run build passes (next build)
userStories.notes:
Edit docs/components/retro-tabs.tsx.

Line 82 (trigger className): Currently inactive triggers have 'border-2 border-transparent'. Change the inactive state to use 'border-2 border-transparent border-b-border' so the bottom border is always visible (matching the list's border-b-2). Active state data-[state=active]:border-border already overrides all sides to solid.

Line 114 (RetroTab content): Change 'mt-2' to 'mt-0' since the list border and content border should be adjacent with no gap.

userStories.title: Fix blockquote vertical margin inconsistency
userStories.description: As a docs reader, I want blockquotes to use the same my-6 vertical margin as all other block-level elements for consistent rhythm.
acceptanceCriteria: cd docs && bun run build passes (next build)
userStories.notes: Edit docs/mdx-components.tsx line 120: change 'my-4' to 'my-6' in the blockquote className.

userStories.title: Add horizontal rule MDX override
userStories.description: As a docs reader, I want horizontal rules (---) to render with a bold 2px border matching the neobrutalist design system instead of the default thin line.
acceptanceCriteria: hr element is overridden in getMDXComponents with border-border border-t-2 my-8 classes
The hr has no default border-bottom (only border-t-2)
cd docs && bun run build passes (next build)
userStories.notes:
Edit docs/mdx-components.tsx. Add an hr override inside getMDXComponents, near the other element overrides (after blockquote, before pre). Add:

hr: ({ className, ...props }: ComponentPropsWithoutRef<'hr'>) => (
  <hr className={cn('border-border my-8 border-t-2 border-b-0 border-x-0', className)} {...props} />
),

The my-8 gives more breathing room than standard blocks (my-6) since horizontal rules are visual separators.

userStories.title: Remove rounded class from callout and card
userStories.description: As a docs reader, I want callouts and cards to have sharp corners matching the neobrutalist design system where --radius is 0.
acceptanceCriteria: RetroCallout div does not have the 'rounded' class
RetroCard link variant does not have the 'rounded' class
RetroCard static variant does not have the 'rounded' class
cd docs && bun run build passes (next build)
userStories.notes:
Edit docs/mdx-components.tsx.

Line 31 (RetroCallout): Remove 'rounded' from the className string. Change 'relative my-6 w-full rounded border-2 p-5' to 'relative my-6 w-full border-2 p-5'.

Line 63 (RetroCard link): Remove 'rounded' from 'bg-card block rounded border-2 p-4'. Change to 'bg-card block border-2 p-4'.

Line 73 (RetroCard static): Remove 'rounded' from 'bg-card rounded border-2 p-4'. Change to 'bg-card border-2 p-4'.

userStories.title: Increase how-it-works heading bottom margin
userStories.description: As a visitor on the home page, I want consistent heading-to-content spacing across all sections.
acceptanceCriteria: cd docs && bun run build passes (next build)
userStories.notes: Edit docs/app/page.tsx line 98: change 'mb-10' to 'mb-12' on the how-it-works h2.
